body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"pre-existing data race in internal/server blocks lefthook pre-commit (ac #8): Bead is well-formed: dependency ddx-24a3da84 is confirmed closed, root-cause line references check out, test names are specific and filterable, and scope is bounded with explicit non-scope. However, open bead ddx-9d547009 documents a deterministic data race in cli/internal/server/provider_probe_cleanup.go that causes 'go test -short -race ./internal/server' to fail on every run. scripts/lefthook-go-test.sh runs exactly that command for each staged package; internal/server will be staged by this bead's changes. AC #8 ('lefthook run pre-commit passes') will therefore fail on any commit this bead produces, blocking completion without fixing an out-of-scope bug.","fingerprint":"8e23230d96f2e1d5f337685b6ac3abcbad49a6021bf66ba81d08e35b0b1cb771","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"8e23230d96f2e1d5f337685b6ac3abcbad49a6021bf66ba81d08e35b0b1cb771"}
